---
title: "Updates"
listing:
    type: table
    contents: "posts/**/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    categories: true
    fields: [date, title, description]
    page-size: 15
    table-striped: true
    table-hover: true
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
citation: false
license: ""
---
